#Vendettas: Race across a giant hashtag over water to plant your figures on four opponents' poles
'Nother Trucker: Swing from a rope atop a speeding truck to smack a dozen roadside targets
40 Yard Dash: Run trench obstacles to fetch six puzzle pieces one at a time, then solve the puzzle
A Dark Turn: Feel a stack of puzzle pieces in a dark container and replicate the order outside
Abandon Ship: Dive to release buoys that inflate a life raft, then race the raft to shore
Aerial Takedown: Shove rivals off a cargo net dragged by a helicopter into the water below
Against the Current: Paddle a kayak upstream against the current, then race back to the finish
Agent Down: Pull 200 meters of rope, then hold your partner as they dangle off a platform ledge
Air Lift: Grab helicopter ropes from a speeding boat, hang to the drop zone, and swim to a button
Air Pockets: Swim deep between underwater air-pocket cages with a teammate to reach a flag and back
Air Strike: Hang from a suspended bar and knock the opponent off before falling twice
Airdrop Extraction: Haul military crates a mile, then bomb a launch platform with crates from a helicopter
Airheads: Slide into a lake, memorize a floating puzzle diagram, and rebuild it on shore
All Brawl: Wrestle through a mud pit across three rounds to seize an X-shaped relic
All Shook Up: Shake opponents off parallel ropes over a mud pit and be the last one hanging
Amazed: Navigate a shipping-container maze to find and solve a Sudoku puzzle, then escape
Ancient Challenge History: Answer Challenge history trivia or step onto ever-weaker platforms over water
Ankle Breaker: Drag your ankle-tied opponent through sand in a tug of war to the finish line
Are You the One?: Answer trivia while wrapped in a hanging blanket over water; two misses drops the pair
Arms-a-geddon Tired: Battle in a five-minute tug-of-war to pull in the longest length of 400-foot rope
Around the Block: Climb a crane-suspended truss and grab as many hanging flags as possible
Ascender: Climb a rope to release puzzle pieces, then descend and solve a tangram-style puzzle
Assembly Required: Take apart a 20-foot replica pyramid, move the pieces, and rebuild it
Asset Destruction: Pull a crate of heavy bombs, then hurl them to break 13 wall targets
Auto Body Rally: Drag-race a sports car, then steer a giant two-person bicycle through hay bales
Back It Up: Shimmy up a wall face-to-face, ferrying pottery on your laps to a hole at the top
Back Me Up: Drag or push opponents down a ramp while strapped back-to-back to them
Back Off: Snatch the hook off your opponent's back and clip it to a ring at the arena's edge
Back Up Off Me: Drag your back-to-back-tied opponent until you can knock over your own barrel
Back in Slack: Cross an obstacle course, then land a set number of items on a target
Backstabber: Walk a rooftop balance beam and knock rivals off after reaching the X's at the end
Bad Dreams: Pillow-fight the opponent off a beam over a mud pit
Balancing Act: Swing onto a tilted platform over water and shift weight to level it out
Ball & Chain: Answer six trivia questions by hanging chained medicine balls under the right panels
Ball Brawl: Race and tackle for footballs one at a time to score points before your rival
Ball Control: Form human ladders in the water to drop 23 name balls into a chute atop a platform
Balls In: Score balls in a center goal while your opponent defends, then swap roles
Balls In 2.0: Rush past a defender to score a ball into the goal in alternating rounds
Balls Out (Endurance): Slide silver balls over a wall so your side ends with the fewest
Balls Up: Use a plunger in a mud pit to push opponents' balls out of an overhead net
Balls of Fire: Kick soccer balls through a wall of fire into your opponent's goal
Balls to the Wall: Yank a series of torches out of a wall faster than your opponent
Band Together: Anchor a pipe with resistance bands from heavy items, then walk it to grab a flag
Banded Together: Stretch against a rubber-band tether across a field to grab the far pole together
Banquet of Champions: Haul coded boxes via trivia, then choke down brain soup and other vile dishes
Barrel Tag: Play tag using two barrels to cross the Arena without touching the ground
Basket Brawl: Fight to score a medicine ball into an elevated barrel while fending off the opponent
Basket Case: Break out of a giant basket, then collect pieces and solve a puzzle
Batman Wall: Climb a wall by rope to grab puzzle bags, then solve for a lockbox combo and raise a flag
Batten Down the Hatches: Climb down hanging rope ladders from a suspended boat, swap sides, and climb back in
Battering Ram: Swing a suspended log by ropes to smash through two-ton castle doors
Battle Lines: Drag a barrel of supplies across a field, solving a math problem and puzzle en route
Battle Royale: Sprint through a narrow hallway to steal rings from the rival team's pole and race back
Battle for Honor: Shove opponents off a muddy platform into the water using gladiator shields
Bed Head: Leap as a team from bed to bed on shrinking platforms suspended over water
Bell Ringer: Swing a bell rope to smash 16 idols as exploding powder clouds your view
Better Homes and Island Living: Build a home or bathroom at camp in 24 hours using provided supplies, judged on quality
Bingo Bango: Dive into a mud pit for numbered balls to complete a five-in-a-row bingo board
Black Sand Ops: Dig under torches for buried puzzle pieces, then assemble an Icelandic totem from a key
Blackout: Scratch paint from a pitch-black box's window to find codes, break out, and solve a puzzle
Blade Runner: Chop through wood with swords to free puzzle bundles, then solve a rotating coin puzzle
Blast Off: In pads and helmets, tackle the opposing pair out of the circle three times
Blind Faith: Pick teammates blind for four mystery challenges hinted only by cryptic symbols
Blind Leading the Blind: A caller directs blindfolded teammates to collect items scattered around a field
Blindsided: Break a wooden stick on the opponent while blindfolded, guided by a partner's voice
Bloc'd In: Slide black cars around like a giant slide puzzle to free and push a red car to the finish
Block Head: Gather nine giant cubes around the arena and arrange them into a puzzle pattern
Block Heads: Roll a locked cage to collect four flags, then crack the code to escape and hit the button
Blockbuster: Push blocks onto the opponent's side of a structure without falling off
Bobblehead Bobsled: Race a bobsled in bobbleheads to shut a draining valve and save the most water
Body Check: Burst through paper barriers past your opponent, loop the far bell, and ring yours
Body Painters: Cover six canvases in paint using only your speedo-clad body
Bolas for Blood: Solve math equations, dig mud-pit balls to build bolas, and sling them onto a post
Bomb Squad: Relay a math code from a stunt car through decoders to detonate a bomb
Bombs Away: Heave medicine balls out of a barrel, then race to ignite a smoke bomb first
Bombshell Battle: Wrestle colored bombs out of a mud pit, then race rivals for dwindling silver bombs
Boom Raiders: Sprint through trenches stealing rivals' dynamite until you can detonate their bunkers
Bottleneck Stampede: Shove your whole team through narrow obstacle bottlenecks to the finish line
Bottoms Out: Answer math questions to earn climbing holds, then dangle in a bottomless container
Boulder Smash: Push a giant ball against the other tribe and score three goals past your line
Bounce Out: In bumper suits, escort your human 'ball' teammate into the opposing soccer goal
Boxster-phobia: Crawl through a box of doors memorizing numbers, then solve the equation to unlock a button
Brain Buster: Swing upside down from ropes to pass beer steins onto color-coded pedestals
Brain Freeze: Relay puzzle pieces from freezing ocean water, then assemble a puzzle tower
Brain Squeeze: Search a fort for hidden bags of puzzle pieces, then assemble the puzzle outside
Branched Out: Climb a tree by placing 21 branch pegs in slots and ring the bell at the top
Break Free: Swing on a rope through drywall to reach and solve a 3D puzzle
Breaking Barriers: Smash through a hallway of doors with tools to reach the middle button first
Breaking Up: Swing a wrecking ball upward to smash through two layers of cinder blocks
Breaking on Through: Smash down through three tower floors and a steel door to ring the bell
Breakthrough: Swing through brick walls, rebuild them, solve an equation, and finish a second puzzle
Brick by Brick: Carry bricks one at a time across a plank without dropping or breaking any
Bridge It: Ascend a rope bridge up a tower using three movable rungs without dropping them
Bridging The Gap: Complete rope and jump-rope tasks in a shared poncho to earn planks and build a bridge
Broken Dreams: Race a five-checkpoint mini-final up a trail for extra performance points
Brush Contact: Relay money bags down a field while the defending team tries to steal them away
Buck-A-Neer: Balance on rope-rigged barrels while the other team yanks the ropes to topple you
Buddy Blinders: Balance on a pole to reveal a pattern, then run back and recreate it from memory
Bug Helmet: Keep your syrup-covered head in a box full of cockroaches longer than your rival
Build Me Up: Stack heavy wine barrels across a field to reach and set off three station flares
Building Bridges: Scale walls collecting coins, solve a puzzle, and rope-swing into a stack of boxes
Burning Bridges: Jump to ring a bell, grab planks, and build a 16-plank bridge one jump at a time
Burnout: Steer water into your opponent's barrel to douse their pot of burning cigars
Burnt: Hang from a structure and pull your rope to send a flag to a barrel before yours explodes
Burst Your Bubble: Climb a 40-foot rope ladder to a hot air balloon and cross a beam to a second one
Busting Balls: Direct a blindfolded partner aiming a ball launcher to hit 50 targets
Butch Cassidy: Jump off a platform, regroup at a meeting point, then race together to the finish
Cable Connection Showdown: Untangle cables and plug them into a motherboard to light up a season-logo sign
Cage Match: Wrestle the rope from the center of a cage and drag it outside first
Caged In: Crawl through a mud pit under a mesh cage, nudging ten balls out with your fingers
Capsized: Flip a boat to memorize a flag key, then dive for flags and rehang them correctly
Captain's Chair: Answer trivia while wrong answers deliver electric shocks to your strapped-in captain
Captain's Choice: The team captain picks which elimination game to play
Car Crash: Leap from car to car suspended over water, climbing through each backseat along the way
Car Crusher: Flatten a car with heavy machinery, then push the wreck through your goal
Car Sick: Spin in a descending van memorizing radio clues, then unlock suitcases and solve a puzzle
Carry On: Carry a teammate's coconut bag through obstacles, collect rings, and land them on a post
Catch & Release: Leap onto a swinging bag and ride it across to grab hanging flags
Catch a Falling Star: Search a huge ball pit for 12 starred balls and deposit them one at a time
Catch-22: Toss balls over a net to your partner while running on ever-faster treadmills
Chain Game: Race over dunes to a shipwreck, then loop a chain around poles to match a diagram
Chain Reaction: Pull a chain through a pyramid, memorize its color sequences, and replicate them
Chair'd Remains: Escape from a chair after being taped to it by an opponent's ally, then ring the bell
Chairman of the Board: Answer trivia from a chair 30 feet above water where wrong answers drop you in
Challenger's Choice: The chosen challenger picks which elimination game to play
Chaos Elimination: Fit six blocks inside a square box to solve the puzzle first
Charge the Wall: Punch through a giant climbing wall to find three hidden batteries and power a light
Cheat Codes: Replicate on-screen cheat codes by pressing buttons on a giant video game controller
Chill Out: Alternate sitting in an ice tub and stacking a plank-and-disc puzzle to height
Chock Full o' Coconuts: Ferry 200 coconuts across on bamboo sticks with a partner without dropping them
Chopper Drop: Hang from a helicopter and drop into floating targets, then swim to a platform
Climber's Paradise: Scale a climbing wall by placing pegs, communicating shapes with your partner
Closing Time: Crank a gate open, haul cinderblocks through, and build a two-sided puzzle stack
Cloud Catcher: Race helium balloons through a spiked pergola, then solve a riddle to unlock a chest
Coconut Juice: Crack coconuts, carry the juice through obstacles, and fill a tube first
Code Breaker: Smash pots to find spun symbols, then order five past seasons chronologically
Cold War: Dive for puzzle pieces in a pool while rivals dump ice in to freeze the water
Collect Four: Hunt a stadium for tokens and race to line up four in a row on your board
Color Correction: Run a mile to memorize a flashing color sequence, then stack plates in that order
Coming from Behind: Race to ring a bell down one track while a defender on a parallel track blocks the way
Connect Em All: Solve math, haul logs uphill, replicate a memory board, and race solo to the finish
Conquest Elimination: Race through three obstacle-and-puzzle stations to collect flags and return
Control Elimination: Collect bags of blocks and stack them on a wobbly table balanced with one leg
Control Tower: Direct numbered buggies from a control tower to arrange a giant math equation
Corner Ball: Race for a rugby ball and force it to your opponent's side of the wall three times
Cradled Cranium: Answer point-value trivia 30 feet over water; wrong answers dunk two teammates
Cramping Out: Squeeze through a tube crowded with poles, adding more each round until one player can't fit
Crank Shafted: Balance on a wheel while the opponent attaches steering wheels to spin it faster
Crash Course: Crash a stunt car into barrel piles to knock down more barrels than anyone else
Crash Landing: Solve a puzzle atop a rotating airplane, then leap off into the water below
Crate Expectations: Stack 125 crates into towers to grab 12 hanging relics, then haul everything to the finish
Crawl Brawl: Carry bags through a tunnel, then drag them to the bell and ring it
Crazy 8: Fight to drag a figure-eight ring to your side of the arena twice
Crossed Paths: Traverse a high rope over water, crossing past your teammate midway
Crossover: Swim a lagoon, dig up buried puzzle pieces from chests, and solve a puzzle with a partner
Crunch: Hold a crunch upside down over a water tank with 40 pounds on your chest
Cyclone: Climb a spinning container over water to transfer five blocks to a ledge at the top
Dangle Duo: Climb a 100-foot suspended ladder with your partner and raise a flag to the top
Dark Mine: Cross out announced numbers on a board deep in a dark mine using only matchlight
Dark Tide: Drop from a speeding boat, paddleboard for rings, and toss one around a pole onshore
Day of Wreckoning: Scavenge a junkyard for an hour, hauling the heaviest trash back to your dumpster
Dead Drop: Carry capsules across a beam over water while rivals swing bombs to knock you off
Dead Man's Drop: Hang upside down from a high pole by your legs longer than your opponent
Dead Ringer: Swing between poles to place six rings, one on each pole
Deadweight: Drag three 300-pound coffins across the arena and chain them to a post
Decode and Detonate: Race to puzzle keys, crack your code, and hit a detonator to blow up a truck
Decontamination: Race through foam in PPE to memorize flashing lights and replicate the color sequence
Decryption: Sprint up a volcanic mound, memorize a color code, and replicate it with colored wires
Deep Blue: Dive 30 feet for a flag, then hold your breath underwater longer than the other teams
Deep Blue Dive: Solve math equations, then dive to retrieve the puzzle piece bearing each answer
Deep Web: Descend a 25-foot tower through webs to retrieve eight pieces and solve a puzzle on top
Diamond Dash: Race with a sledgehammer, crack a code for a diamond, and sort into new teams
Die Hard: Roll a giant die into a square with the right number up, without touching the ground
Die for Me: Roll a cage down a path, placing numbered balls into matching landmines to detonate the end
Dig Deep: Solve three puzzles inside a mine shaft, then dig out and race to the finish line
Dirtballer: Dig up goalposts, replant them into a goal across a field, and kick a field goal
Dirty Deeds: Dig items from a dirt pile and deposit them in a basket while fighting off the opponent
Dirty Drifter: Unchain a van, hitch it to a tow truck, then steer it around obstacles while towed
Dirty Laundry: Rub soap off a pole to reveal numbers, then hang the matching numbered shirts on a line
Dirty Mouth: Blindfolded, haul oversize balls out of a mud pit guided by your partner's voice
Dive Bomb: Ride a sea scooter to gather underwater puzzle pieces, then solve and detonate
Dog Day Afternoon: Drag opponents on a dog sled through a 50-yard dash with your partner
Don't Cross Me: Cross giant suspended cross-shaped beams, meet in the middle, and climb down
Don't Forget About Me: Memorize a key under a heavy steel door, then hike a mountain to solve a memory puzzle
Don't Let Go: Grip your partner's hands over a canyon swing for as long as possible
Don't Let Me Down: Roll a heavy cylinder up a steep ramp and hold it at the top for a full minute
Don't Push Me Around: Play tackle rugby through an obstacle course to carry the ball to your end zone
Don't Rock the Boat: Climb a shipwreck's rigging mast to mast with your partner and ring the crow's nest bell
Don't Toss Your Cookies: Eat cookies and milk, then ride a spinning platform without vomiting
Don't Trip Me Up: Dive to untie tiles, then build a house of cards on a floating platform
Don't Weigh Me Down: Hold up a basket while opponents pile rocks in it to drag it to the ground
Don't Wine for Me, Argentina: Solve a riddle, then haul six heavy wine barrels from a vineyard onto racks
Doom Buggy: Unhook ten tires while being dragged across the desert behind a speeding buggy
Doom Sticks: Survive three elimination events in pairs until one team wins the final round
Door Jam: Spin rotating wall doors so more logos face your team when time expires
Door Slammer: Shove a door and your opponent backward into the door frame
Double Decker: Push a sliding bar past the opponent in a two-level hallway brawl
Double Trouble: Traverse four speeding cars beside a truck to ferry keys back from your partner
Down the Line: Dig up puzzle bags, crank out a zip line for your partner, and solve a word puzzle
Down the Tube: Push a large ball out the opponent's end of a tube twice
Down to the Wire: Maneuver a handcuffed pole through an obstacle course to collect a key and return
Downfall: Climb rope ladders to untie a symbol, drop rivals' ladders, and solve a math puzzle
Downpour: Hose water into a tank while the opposing defender blocks the stream with a shield
Draggin' the Dragon: Push a cart through obstacles collecting chests, then assemble a giant dragon puzzle
Dragging the River: Haul an item over land and sea obstacles, then knock down targets with a slingshot
Drive Me Crazy: Alternate go-kart laps and timed puzzle-solving with your partner across four puzzles
Drone Ball Drop: Chase down a ball dropped by a drone and carry it to your basket to score
Drone Control: Fly a drone through a tunnel via a partner's VR calls to fetch a code and crack a puzzle
Drone Drop: Race to grab a drone-dropped ball and place it on a podium twice
Drop Out: Climb a swivel ladder, then leap and cling to a hanging canvas bag for five seconds
Drop the Ball: Catch balls falling from a pinball machine and score them past a blocking opponent
Drum Roll: Cling to a rope atop a rolling drum over water and outlast everyone else
Duel Pole Dancing: Race up a totem pole using climbing holds and ring the bell at the top
Dug Out: Run through dug-out half-pipe trenches transferring colored balls to a partner's rack
Dulcimer Stomp: Unspool ribbons for a key, build a ladder, then stomp to launch balls into five targets
Duned: Race a three-checkpoint mini-final across a series of punishing sand dunes
Dunking for Dinner: Get crane-dunked to move disks, then eat as many dishes as the disks earned
Dust to Dust: Smash bricks through a grate and wheelbarrow the debris to a target height
Ejection: Joust your opponent's target to tilt their platform until they fall off
En Tu Cara: Move blocks to release balls, then throw at 10 targets while the opponent defends
End of My Rope: Unravel a rope threaded over poles to create slack and clip it to a carabiner
End of the Line: Descend a rope over water and brake as close to its end as possible without falling
End of the Rope: Pull a buried rope from a small platform faster than the opponent
Enredo Piramidal: Knot a rope all over a pyramid, then untangle the opponents' knots first
Escape the Cage: Climb out of a rope cage before your opponent while they try to hold you back
Escape the Room: Solve puzzles on trapdoors above water before the floors drop you in one by one
Escape the Volcano: Race five miles to a volcano crater, free your chained partner, and solve a puzzle
Escape to Freedom: Ride an obstacle course dragged by a boat and ring the bell past a rival defender
Evil Eye: Wrestle a giant eye disk from the opponent and carry it out of bounds twice
Eye in the Sky: Guide a blindfolded partner across an elevated platform using a VR feed of their view
Face the Facts: Answer trivia over water; wrong answers add balls until teams get dunked
Fall Out: Remove floor tiles in a suspended cube, grab a hammer, and smash through the glass bottom
Fallout: Launch a partner off a pendulum rod to touch a floating buoy across an elevated obstacle
Family Connection: Move balls across the beach using only head-mounted panels, never your hands
Family Dinner: Chew insects and spit them through a tube into a cup while a snake looms over a teammate
Fandemonium: Carry balls down a 150-foot hallway against the blast of three giant hurricane fans
Fast & Furious: Collect magnetic puzzle pieces from a moving semi-truck and solve on its roof
Fast Pass: Maneuver a giant Y-beam through trees to fetch sandbags, then balance them on a beam
Fast Thinking: Answer trivia on a stair climber over water that speeds up with every wrong answer
Fate of the Gladiators: Punch targets on a dodging opponent while blindfolded, fastest hits win
Feel the Burn: Rebuild a picnic while a jet engine blasts 80 mph winds at everything
Ferryman: Pull a raft between platforms, retrieve keys, and unlock blocks to solve a puzzle
Fire & Ice: Stand on melting ice holding fish guts aloft while throwing beanbags to heat the rival's block
Fire Away: Chase trebuchet-launched balls to fill a tube, then race to solve a puzzle
Fire Ball: Score a flaming ball into a basket while the opponent defends the goal
Fire Escape: Shimmy along a beam suspended by wrists and feet, down the rail and back, fastest
Fire Plunge: Hot-wire a convertible that drives off a cliff, then unclip into the water and swim in
Fire Walker: Rotate a hexagonal platform to align six bowls with a flamethrower and light them all
Fireball: Carry flaming balls across the Arena to line up three in a row on a tic-tac-toe board
Firestarter: Push a rock cart with a lit torch to ignite the opponent's fuse first
Firing Squad: Fight for a cannon-launched ball and score it into the bucket
Flag Down: Grab point-value flags while strapped to the side of a tank driving through a course
Flight Pattern: Memorize a pattern from a helicopter, drop into water, and replicate it onshore
Flip Cup: Flip cups face down, then flip a giant cup with a partner inside across the course
Flip the Switch: Flip ten barrels over a rail onto the opponent's side, then hit the switch
Flipping Agents: Flip a caged partner to magnet-collect 12 puzzle pieces, then solve a world map puzzle
Flipping Wasted: Pull a partner strapped to a board up from a mud pit so they can solve a puzzle
Flying Around: Chug a foul smoothie, then catch thrown rings while spinning on an excavator arm
Flying Leap: Jump back and forth on a suspended platform grabbing flags in three minutes
Food Wars: Buzz in on trivia to force rival teams to eat gross dishes before time runs out
Force Field: Race to cross your opponent's line while roped together through an overhead pulley
Fortress Bricks: Lug 40 cinder blocks out of a fort to earn planks, then assemble a plank puzzle
Forty-fication: Solve equations to unlock chains, then place freed boxes on designated spots
Free Your Mind: Wriggle a pipe-covered bodysuit free from an intersecting cage
Freezing as Puck: Push your partner across an ice rink on a giant ice block to hit scoring targets
Frenemies: Match answers about your partner or watch them drop from a platform into the water
Frog Smash: Cross a narrow high beam while swinging opponents try to knock you into the water
Frozen Senseless: Feel hidden shape cubes, describe them from an ice bath, and have a partner build them
Game of Bridge: Build a plank bridge, cross it, then reuse puzzle planks to solve a puzzle
Gas Problems: Memorize codes inside a gas chamber to unlock boxes and assemble a layered puzzle
Gasping for Air: Dive 15 feet down at night and slide a ring along a 150-foot underwater rope
Gates of Hell: Sprint down a corridor and beat the closing gate each round to survive
Get Off the Rock: Race overnight up the Rock of Gibraltar, holding weighted boxes in a subway car en route
Getting Hammered: Pull one hundred nails from one board and hammer them into another, then hit the button
Getting Tanked: Fish letter tiles from a swerving tank truck to spell out 'Challenge Champion'
Getting Tyred: Swim a lake, then complete tasks to earn tyres and haul them to your station for points
Gimme Three Steps: Race to a giant tower, release stairs to reach the top, and finish a final task
Gimme a Hand: Walk a tightrope between nine-story buildings strapped to your partner
Giraffic Park: Memorize a carved giraffe, then swim a lake to find and return its identical twin
Give Me Some Honey: Walk a beam soaked in honey and let your partner scrub it off into a bucket
Give Me Some Slack: Describe a climbing wall design to a partner who recreates it while sharing one rope
Gladieater: Paddle a dragon boat, eat delicacies, and hang 40 season shields in chronological order
Global Domination: Roll giant metal spheres over targets while defensive spheres try to block you
Global Exchange: Bike chained together between two map halves to label countries in the right spots
Go the Distance: Leap off a platform into water to grab a hanging baton that moves farther each round
Going Out of Tile: Eat two Carolina reaper peppers, then punch out all your colored tiles and race back
Going Under: Dive in a tank to retrieve pieces and replicate a puzzle key underwater
Going Up: Jump into a water pit and climb a rope to the top to ring a bell
Going the Distance: Untangle two hundred feet of heavy rope from a low structure
Grape Smash: Stomp grapes and transfer the juice by mouth into bottles within thirty minutes
Great Escape Run: Dig up or unlock ladder rungs, build the ladder, and climb to the top first
Ground Control: Pull down a line of pegs toward a button while dragging the tethered opponent away from theirs
Hacete la Rata: Spin inside a giant steel wheel to reel in a ball on a 100-metre rope, twice
Hall Brawl: Charge through a narrow hallway past your opponent to hit the button first
Hall Brawl (Physical): Charge through a narrow hallway past your opponent to ring a bell
Hall Pass: Race to carry five colored balls through a narrow hay-lined passage
Hammer It Home: Sledgehammer a beam along a track to the bell, tagging in your partner halfway
Hammock Crawl: Cross under a platform by climbing hammock to hammock with your partner
Hand Car: Pump a railroad hand car back and forth to pick up every teammate
Hand It Over: Tug-of-war three oversized poles through a wall against your opponent
Hand Me Down: Traverse five ropes hanging from a platform atop a skyscraper without falling
Handcuffs: Wrestle rings out of your opponent's hands five times
Hands Off: Carry puzzle pieces with giant chopsticks over stairs and a beam, then solve the puzzle
Hands On: Lean into your partner as your platforms slowly separate, and don't fall in the mud
Hang Man: Hang from a pole with your partner longer than the other teams
Hang On: Hang upside down and grip your partner over water longer than the other pairs
Hang Tough: Hang from monkey bars and knock your opponent off to be the last one up
Hang in the Balance: Carry puzzle pieces across an angled balance beam together and assemble a vertical puzzle
Hanging by a Thread: Hang upside down and saw through the rope holding your rivals' swing to dunk them
Hangman: Hang right side up from a pole 10 feet in the air longer than your opponent
Haul or Nothing: Race six miles with a heavy plank through barrel, sled, and tire-sorting checkpoints
Haystack Heist: Stack hay bales while tethered together to reach hanging keys and unlock a buried chest
He Said, She Said: Bet on how much food an opposing player can eat in three minutes
Head Banger: Blast through walls, then smash glass with oversized balls to retrieve two small ones
Head Rush: Swing upside down by your ankles to collect puzzle pieces, then solve the puzzle
Heads Will Roll: Run across a rotating log between platforms to hand flags off to a teammate
Hear Me Out: Play blindfolded soccer guided only by your partner's shouted directions
Help Me, Rhonda: Race a mile uphill, zipline a chasm, run through town, then rappel off a bridge
Herculean Strength: Hold 120 pounds while a partner solves math to pile more weight on the opponent's bar
High Ball: Haul balls uphill balanced on a giant martini-glass carrier and drop them in a basket
High Dive: Sprint off a platform above a waterfall with your partner and jump for distance
High-Q: Answer trivia on a platform that tilts steeper with every wrong answer
Higher Assets: Climb a 20-foot rope to memorize an answer key and replicate it with tiles below
Highway Hijacking: Leap between speeding trucks for a key, then drive a buggy out of the trailer to the finish
Highway to Hell: Solve a puzzle strapped to the roof of a drifting car within three minutes
Him Collider: Run laps around a circular cage carrying a football and score it in the goal twice
Hip to Be Square: Move a tile through a series of slide puzzles, then use it to finish a final one
Hog Tie: Shimmy along a bamboo pole hanging by your wrists and feet, grab a key, and unlock free
Hold 'Em Back: Swing on ropes to place tokens in goals while the opponent pulls the rope back
Hold On for Me: Hang from a bar off a building until your partner leaps to launch you toward a flag
Hold That Pose: Strap into ropes by hands and feet and hold a group pose above the sand for a minute
Hold Up: Assemble a puzzle on a platform held aloft by a partner pulling a lever
Hole Control: Escape a deep mud pit over a wall with 24 poles and arrange them into a logo in time
Home Wrecker: Smash a room of furniture and stuff every piece through a small wall slot
Hook Me: Reel your swimming teammate out of the water with a deep-sea fishing pole
Hook, Line & Sinker: Traverse a suspended platform over water using metal hooks and foot holds
Hooked: Jump onto a zip line into the water, then swim around a buoy to reach a boat
Hooking Up: Clip hanging carabiners to your opponent's back to launch them to the ceiling
Hot Wheel: Spin steering wheels to steer a shared torch and light six assigned targets first
How I Roll: Rotate a track to roll nine balls into nine baskets
Human Candelabra: Hold a lit candle in each outstretched arm longer than your opponent
Human Ox Pull: Drag a massive weighted sled across a dirt field faster than the other team
Hunger Games: Bid on how much food your team can eat, then eat it without anyone vomiting
I Can: Bet on how many heavy items like watermelons or logs you can lift in a cart
I Can See: Hoist a board and unscramble six words, then press a button to verify
I Got You Babe: Walk a tightrope between buildings while a suspended partner drops a support rope
I'll Be There for You: Take turns diving to hold a weighted chest off an underwater platform
Ice Bath: Soak arms in ice water, then unlock and solve a slide puzzle between freezing dips
Ice Breakers: Sledgehammer giant ice blocks through grates and smash the heaviest pile in five minutes
Ice Spy: Swim glacial water to fetch ice blocks, chip out a 'kill' capsule, and dish out strikes
Icy Hot: Jump to hit buttons a thousand times, break jerseys from ice, then jump a thousand more
Impending Dune: Chase a ball down a sand dune, haul puzzle pieces back up, and solve at the bottom
In The Trenches: Haul ten sandbags past your opponent from one end of a trench to the other
In Your Face: Move blocks to release balls, then throw at 10 targets while the opponent defends
In a Roll: Spin inside a giant steel wheel to reel in a ball on a 100-metre rope, twice
Incredible Deflating Kayak: Inflate a kayak, paddle across a river and back, then deflate and repack it
Inertia: Roll a giant wheel down a three-hump track and back as fast as possible
Insane Games: Compete in a gauntlet of oddball mini-games from chariot races to ear pulls
Inside Out: Pull against a roped rival to ring a bell, then wrestle both feet out of a ring
Interrogation: Hold an overhead bar over water while trivia answers tilt bars until players drop
Iron Triangle: Grab the ball inside a triangular cage and throw it out to land within the circle
It's a Long Way to the Top: Throw crates down a four-story tower to release ammo, then hit targets with it
Jail Break: Fish keys from bowls of slop with your face, unlock your cuffs, and sprint shackled
Judgement Day: Leap, swim, and rope-swing between three containers to slide a ring onto a pole
Jump Down Under: Leap into a lake, climb a floating launch for a flag, then swim to the flag poles
Keep It Up: Balance two poles against an overhead board longer than anyone else
Killer Quads: Chase the opponent around a track on small ATVs to grab the flag off their bike
King of the Hills: Race up ramps to press the button under randomly illuminating lights for points
King of the Wall: Swim to a slanted slippery wall, climb it with your partner, and ring the bell
King of the World: Race to grab the ball with the correct trivia answer and deposit it in a goal
Kitty Litter: Collect three rings and throw them onto a target so they hook
Knock Off: Push your opponent off a wall ledge 30 feet up using its pegs
Knock Out: Race the opponent to ring a hanging bell in the middle of the ring twice
Knock Your Block Off: Use a pugil stick to knock the block off your opponent's helmet
Knot So Fast: Tie knots with 200 feet of rope for 20 minutes, then untangle your opponent's first
Knot So Fast (Strategy): Tie knots in a dome for ten minutes, then untie your opponents' knots first
Knots of War: Knot a rope through a car for 15 minutes, then untie the opponent's knots first
Know Your Loved One: Match answers to questions with your loved one to prove how well you know each other
Knowledge is Powered: Pedal bikes to light six lamps while memorizing and replicating flashed symbols
Ladder Daze: Free a ladder from a crate, haul it through obstacles, and climb it to finish
Ladder Race: Race a ladder up, across, and down a 40-foot tower faster than your rival
Ladder of Doom: Climb down a ladder over a 50-foot drop, grab a flag, and bring it back up in relay
Ladies and the Tramp: Bounce on a trampoline to memorize an answer key over a wall, then recreate it with tiles
Laps of Judgement: Complete would-you-rather checkpoints, then run tokens up a hill and over a wall
Laser Focus: Touch as many laser beams as possible with hands tied while a defender blocks
Lasso Me: Toss a hoop to ring it around the opponent's body, best of rounds
Last Chance: Bull past a defender through a narrow hallway to ring the bell first
Last Life: Duel rivals one-on-one on a balance beam, shoving them into the water to drain team lives
Launch Button: Swing while harnessed to a container to press twenty buttons and light all lights
Leaning Tower: Swim for twelve pegs, then use them to climb a telephone pole and ring the bell
Leap of Faith: Jump off a skyscraper helipad to snatch hanging flags, then solve a puzzle
Leaps and Bounds: Bounce from trampolines onto ever-smaller platforms without using your hands
License to Chill: Swim an icy pool to ring a bell, then solve a puzzle between forced re-dips
Light It Up: Solve a 3D puzzle, then paddle a coracle to gather ten colored lights from lake buoys
Light My Fire: Wrestle a metal pole from the opponent, then set it on fire to win
Lights Out: Assemble a puzzle in a black box while running to restore the lights when they cut out
Like Clockwork: Identify the working gear combination through glass and direct a partner to build it
Loaded Barrel: Roll inside a barrel to collect five bags of puzzle pieces, then solve the puzzle
Lock, Stack & Barrel: Arrange symbol-topped barrels to match an answer key, then race to the button
Logged Out: Memorize a puzzle, haul picture logs up a mountain, and rebuild it at the top
Looper: Pull against your roped opponent around two posts in a tug-of-war to reach a bell
Loose Ends: Untangle three giant wires from a wheel and plug them into outlets across the Arena
Losing Face: Race through obstacles to a slingshot and knock down all your targets
Lost and Found: Carry weighted backpacks through a woodland course, solving puzzles along the way
Lube Me Up: Slide down a slick course and wrestle an oversize ball back up the slope
Luging My Mind: Ride a luge down a course in bobbleheads, then solve a puzzle with your partner
Map It Out: Climb a world-map rock wall placing country flags on the right nations
Mask Match: While blindfolded, carry bags of pieces and duplicate a mask by feel
Matt Finish: Cross obstacles with a bag of balls, then land each ball on a narrow overhead perch
Me Muevo Te Muevas: Tilt a giant table maze from platforms to roll five balls out
Meet Me Halfway: Crash through drywall maze walls from opposite ends to unlock a center box and ring a bell
Melt Away: Melt shields out of giant ice blocks with your bodies, then order seasons chronologically
Memory Lane: Flip pairs of covered tiles to match symbols and uncover all 24
Mid-Final Elimination: Fill out a crossword of ten countries from past final locations on a map
Might Light: Collect illuminated cylinders and slot them into a wall to line up rows of three
Miles of Exile: Sprint ten miles of beach roped to your partner, hitting checkpoints and puzzles
Milk & Cookies: One partner balances on a perch while the other eats cookies and sour milk
Million Dollar Heist: Haul $1 million in banknotes weighing 2,000 pounds from a vault to a getaway SUV
Mind Grind: Push a 250-pound wheel around a circle, then solve a math equation with number tiles
Mindfield: Crawl, climb, and haul a tire to earn puzzle pieces, then solve the final puzzle
Mine Not Yours: Wrestle a handle away from your opponent twice
Mine the Cart: Wheel a suspended cart to grab medallions before rivals saw through its support ropes
Mission Improbable: Maneuver five balls into a maze's center holes while suspended by hands and knees
Moving Pyramid: Crawl a course as a human pyramid, snagging flags off poles along the way
Muay Thai: Karate-kick and break a row of hanging bamboo poles, then ring your gong
Mud Ball Madness: Scoop helicopter-dropped colored balls from a mud pit while tethered to your partner
Musical Inner-Tube Tango: Dance around a pool and grab an inner tube when the music stops, musical-chairs style
My Way or the Highway: Win a chain tug-of-war by dragging your opponent past the center line
Name That Coconut: Find the coconut bearing the name that answers a trivia question
No Slack: Punch through plaster holes in six walls while tethered to your partner to escape a box
Noise Pollution: Stand on a small platform in headphones for hours and outlast your opponent
Not So Bright: Memorize which lights are off on a board, then flip the right switches to light it
Nothin' but Net: Climb cargo nets and swing on ropes over water to collect four flags
Nut Cracker: Take one Tee-ball swing and score by where the ball lands on a point-zoned field
O-Black Water: Cross water obstacles, then use a grappling hook to secure five rings
Obstacle: Race a half-mile, ten-obstacle course ending in a defended mud pit
Off in the Distance: Carry a pole down a trail, completing checkpoints for puzzle pieces to solve at the start
Off the Rails: Cross a balance beam and tightrope atop a moving train while steadying a partner
Off with Your Heads: Snatch five red skulls off the opponent's jumpsuit and place them on pedestals
Oh Ring: Wrestle a ring away from your opponent while both hang suspended by your feet
Oil Change: Wrestle opponents out of a pit of olive oil to win puzzle pieces for your team
Oil and Water: Crawl through an oil pit to fetch dropped balls and score them in your basket
Oiled Up: Haul buckets of oil up a ramp to raise a ball to the line in a tube
On the Ropes: Cross ropes between platforms over water, unclipping a rival rope after each trip
One Step at a Time: Uncover directions across the Arena and order colored tiles across boxes accordingly
Open Arms: Zip line over a pond, catch your partner mid-air, then swim around a buoy to ring a bell
Oppenheimer: Sprint through a caged circular hallway past your opponent to ring a bell twice
Out of Reach: Swing to kick a key into water, retrieve it, and unlock puzzle pieces to solve
Out of Time: Run up a ramp, climb down to hit a button, and slide back for laps over five minutes
Out on a Ledge: Race chained sub-teams up a skyscraper, a rooftop plank, and a puzzle station
Outside the Box: Swing between a moving semi-truck and a dangling pillar, toppling point-value box stacks
Over a Barrel: Roll barrels across on ropes without ground contact, then solve magic triangle puzzles
Over and Under: Throw a ball over walls while a partner punches through, depositing five balls
Over the Edge: Walk a plank off a 25-story building, climb down a ladder for a flag, and climb back
Paddle Battle: Race boats to shore, haul them uphill, and complete a final task
Paddle Me: Paddle surfboards with your partner to an island, then race back solo
Paddlewheel Puzzle: Memorize codes to unlock 16 pieces inside a rotating paddlewheel and build a flag puzzle
Painfully Wrong: Answer trivia to force rival teams through 7000-volt copper curtains until one remains
Pass with Care: Cross an unstable high rope bridge and pass your partner midway without hands
Patchwork: While bungeed, rip patches off your opponent's suit and stash them in your basket
Pato Brawl: Wrestle a Pato ball out of the opponent's hands to win heats
Peaking Blinders: Balance one-footed to reveal a pattern your partner memorizes and recreates in trips
Pegged: Climb a wall using two pegs and rip your flag off at the top first
Perfect Fit: Dive into a pool to gather scattered puzzle pieces, then assemble the puzzle
Pick It Up: Throw a ball onto a track, grab jacks, and catch the ball before it drops, forty times
Pick It Up Again: Shoot a basketball, then stack bricks on columns before the ball rolls out of play
Piggy Back: Cross hanging ropes over water using teammates as human bridges between platforms
Pile It On: Solve a puzzle before a spool unravels, then hold the pile aloft for five straight minutes
Pin Pop: Lower a giant pin on ropes with a partner to pop seven balloons through a hole
Piranha Feast: Rip meat off a roast using only your mouth and pile the most weight in a basket
Pirates' Treasure: Haul a 100-pound chest through obstacles, smash it open, and hoist a flag up a pole
Playing Dirty: Grab a ball from a mud pit each round and haul it out before opponents do
Plug and Pay: Pass 14 submerged blocks from a draining water tank to a partner who stacks a tower
Points Break: Swim tethered to collect puzzle pieces, then count the triangles in your solved puzzle
Pole Climb: Race up a 10-foot pole and pull the lever that drops your opponent into the pool
Pole Dance: Hoist teammates up a slippery pole to grab a flag, then race the dunes solo
Pole Me Over: Push a shared pole to drive your opponent back and topple their barrels
Pole Position: Roll a die and thread poles into a tube while leaving room to squeeze through
Pole Push: Grip a central pole and shove the opposing team out of the circle
Pole Wrestle: Wrestle a wooden pole out of your opponent's hands twice
Pole in the Storm: Wrestle a pole out of the opponent's hands two out of three times
Popping Tags: Wrestle the opponent to rip three clothing tags off them while guarding your own
Pull It Together: Climb a net for pegs, then a partner uses them to scale a wall and press the button
Pull Me Over: Tug and wiggle a shared rope to yank the opponent off their stump twice
Pull No Punches: Punch through a 30-foot drywall tower and climb up to ring the bell
Pull Your Own Weight: Hoist a weighted bag up a tower to knock down puzzle pieces, then solve the puzzle
Push & Pole: Wrestle an iron pole out of an opponent's hands to score points for the team
Push Me: Push a pivoting pole against your opponent until you can unclip the flag
Push Over: Knock your opponent off a wooden plank twice
Puzzle Dig: Follow rope coordinates to dig up puzzle bags, solving each puzzle for the next spot
Puzzle Pyramid: Solve three puzzles in a row, climbing a podium after each, then ring the bell
Puzzling Swim: Swim in pairs to collect four keys that unlock letter tiles and the answer to a riddle
Qualifier: Race around a stadium completing five checkpoints faster than the other MVPs
Race to Escape: Climb a pole tied back-to-back with a partner, cut free with a blade, and zipline down
Race to Shore: Race across the water to shore to claim immunity or a reward first
Race to the Altar: Race a beach course of wedding tasks: dress up, eat cake, change a tire, carry the bride
Race to the Finish: Cycle to the end of a trail, then follow arrows on foot to the checkpoint
Raft and the Furious: Paddle a raft between buoys, dive for objects, then return to shore for a final task
Rafty Race: Race in swim fins through checkpoints, inflating rafts before rivals claim the gear
Rage Cage: Charge past the opponent down a caged hallway and climb to ring the bell twice
Rail Slide: Hang from a pipe 25 feet up and slide it together across an obstacle course
Ram It Home: Drive a hanging sled to push your opponent back into their own wall
Ramp It Up: Race up your opponents' ramp for balls and drop them in your tube until you have seven
Rampage: Strapped back-to-back, battle to make your opponent fall onto your colored ramp
Rat in a Cage: Untie knotted ropes to reach keys and unlock your way out of a cage first
Reach for the Stars: Haul star-shaped pieces uphill one at a time and fit them onto matching pegs
Relic Runner: Haul heavy relics uphill while the rival team bombards you with balls and water cannons
Resilient River Run: Build a pyramid, float it down a river, and use it to ferry two relics across
Reversible Climbing Wall: Scale a 40-foot wall as your partner inserts pegs from the other side
Rib Cage Pass: Cross beams on a speeding truck to collect and deposit balls before time runs out
Rice Race: Swim rice bags through obstacles, then maneuver balls across a maze into slots
Rickshaw Races: Ferry every teammate around six laps in a rickshaw faster than the other team
Ride 'Em Cowboy: Hang onto a mechanical bull one-handed longer than your opponent
Ring Cling: Free ten chained rings from a pole, peg them into a wall ladder, and climb to the bell
Ring My Bell: Sprint back and forth slamming into a mattress to ring your bell 50 times
Ring Toss: Race across a mud pit to stack rings on opponents' poles and knock them out
Ring Tossed: Wrestle two of three rings away from the other competitors in your round
Ring Wrestle: Wrestle a large ring out of your opponent's grip
Ring of Spies: Wrestle a ring away from the opponent and place it on a post to score twice
Riot Act: Shove opponents off a dirt platform into a mud pit using riot shields
Ripcord Roulette: Answer trivia while suspended, forcing rivals to pull ripcords that may drop them
Ripped Off: Chase the opponent around a tower while harnessed and rip patches off their jumpsuit
Road Kill: Shove your same-gender rival off the back of a moving truck onto the safety nets
Road Warrior: Swing between two semi-trucks moving at 50 mph to pass sixteen rings to your partner
Road to Nowhere: Ride a cart off a 400-foot platform runway, grabbing point-value flags before the edge
Rock & Roll: Wrestle a large handled box to your side of the platform twice
Rocket Run: Sprint across the Lair, hurdle a rocket, and pull a lever within a shrinking time limit
Rocketman: Launch your partner off an airbag over crossbars, then collect pieces and solve a puzzle
Rod Screw-It: Hop over tables, release sixty sandbags, and hit spinning targets to raise flags
Roll with It: Pull a shopping cart along a track using poles and a lasso to grab a star
Roller Derby: Skate ten laps around a rink while knocking rivals over the crash pads
Rollin' in Oats: Coat your body in oatmeal, sprint across a field, and scrape it into a tub
Rolling Thunder: Push a giant boulder along a course with a route choice at a halfway ditch
Rolling in the Deep: Cling to a spinning log over water, then swim the lagoon and ring a bell
Rope Burn: Tug and swing on a shared rope to pull your opponent off their dome
Rope Rumble: Muscle a long heavy rope entirely onto the opponent's half of the Arena
Rotas Cadenas: Answer six trivia questions by hanging chained medicine balls under the right panels
Round 'Em Up: Ride horses to herd a cow into a pen within fifteen minutes
Royal Relay: Swim and row a lake to gather four floating crown pieces and assemble a crown
Royal Rumble: Battle to be the last person standing on a raft
Rumble Tumble: Pull against a back-strapped opponent to knock down three posts first
Run for Your Life: Haul puzzle pieces two at a time up a mountain and solve the puzzle
Run the Plank: Jump off a plank pulling down a ball to lower a maze, then work stars free of it
Runaway Ride: Recreate a trackside pattern by arranging colored balls inside a bus looping a racetrack
Rune Race: Decode a rune math equation to unlock sunken puzzle pieces and solve a puzzle
Runes My Life: Swim and climb pillars to collect rune tiles, solve a puzzle, and swim back
Running Down a Dream: Toss balls into an overhead track, catch them past tripwires, and dig under a log
Running Man: Unchain a shipping container, extract the car inside, and deliver its tracking device
Running Out of Time: Load heavy material into rivals' drums, then hold your own drum up the longest
Running Riot: Retrieve 25 relics and place them in exact order by weight using answer keys
Rush Hour: Slide cars back and forth in a traffic puzzle to free one car without collisions
Sandbag Burn: Drag sleds to transfer 40 heavy sandbags across to a teammate
Satellite Sabotage: Leap across the spokes of a suspended satellite while rivals blast you with a fire hose
Sausage Party: Roll through a barbecue-themed obstacle course on the beach while wrapped in shrink wrap
Sawed Off: Blast a fire hose at your partner's rope to slice it on a blade and drop them
Scratch Off: Scratch paint off a board with a coin to reveal an image, then replicate it in a puzzle
Scratchathon: Walk a treadmill for three hours while covered in itching powder
Screw Off: Bash a metal plate with a baseball bat to unscrew a giant screw
Screw You: Race through obstacles in pairs, unscrewing giant wing nuts along the way
Sea Cave Recon: Cliff-dive 30 feet, swim a sea cave collecting bombs, and ride a bodyboard to a buoy
Seek and Destroy: Dig up nine buried colored tires and order them to match a light pattern
Shack Attack: Run across a field while shackled to a wall and grab the key to unlock yourself
Shadowfighter: Yank ropes tied to your opponent's limbs to pull them off their platform
Shake It Off: Bounce on a rope from both ends to shake all nine medallions off it
Shark Bait: Leap between giant hanging steaks and ropes 40 feet above water to cross a platform
Shattered Dreams: Crank and aim a battering ram together to shatter nine windows on a wall
Shimmy: Climb up between two walls, ripping off flags until you claim the one at the top
Shish Kestack: Dive for colored puzzle pieces and stack them on poles from lightest to darkest
Shooting Gallery: Shoot and destroy a field of targets with a firearm or crossbow before anyone else
Shooting Stars: Answer trivia on a platform over water, assigning strikes that launch players in
Shoots and Ladders: Build a bamboo ladder, then climb it and strike your gong first
Siamese Wrestling: Wrestle bound back-to-back with a partner and pin the other team for three seconds
Side Tracked: Run a dirt track collecting rings and toss them onto opponents' pegs to knock them out
Side by Side: Memorize symbols under vehicles jumping a pit overhead, then replicate the sequence
Sidekick Showdown: Match your answers to your partner's on personal questions, Newlywed Game style
Sideswiped: Swing between speeding trucks to stick disks on your truck while blocking rivals
Sky Ball: Solve a ground puzzle to unlock a suspended sphere and drop 130 balls into a pyramid
Sky Bridge: Finish a half-built bridge dangling from a crane by passing rope and tying knots
Slam Dunk: Bungee jump back-to-back with a partner and dunk balls into point-valued hoops
Slam Dunked: Get dunked into a water tank 15 times while splashing 1500 balls out
Sliders: Race an opponent to solve an identical 16-space slide puzzle
Sling Shot: Get launched off a ramp by a four-wheeler, swim to a bell, and swim back
Slip, Slide & Score: Race down a slippery track to grab a ball and sink it in a basket before your rival
Slippery Business: Shove oil-covered opponents out of a ring and be the last one standing
Slipping Up: Attach poles to a frame to build a ladder, climb it, and ring the bell
Smarty Pants: Answer trivia while hanging from a rope over water; two wrong answers drops you in
Smash House: Sledgehammer furniture into pieces small enough to fit through tiny wall holes
Smash In Puzzle Out: Break glass panes down a tunnel to reach puzzle pieces and solve the puzzle
Smell You Later: Lie in a plexiglass coffin as layers of foul-smelling substances are added
Smuggle Run: Race five miles shouldering a heavy capsule, scaling a wall and solving a hexagon puzzle
Snake in the Grass: Go over and under hurdles to grab piece bags, then solve a snake-shaped puzzle
Snapper: Swing blindfolded to break a stick on your opponent, guided by your partner's voice
Snapping Point: Race around posts while roped to the opponent to press a button first
Spanish Torture: Shimmy along a tightrope with locked hands and feet to ring the bell first
Spanish Treasure: Swim relay-style to net balls under a treasure chest until it floats up to shore
Spearheaded: Untangle chains and pull eight spears from the walls of a cage
Speed Dating: Jump between moving tractor trailers to shuttle colored balls into an arrow slot
Speed Jumps: Bounce on a trampoline to sum hidden numbers, then grab flags from a moving truck
Spell-Lunkers: Dive to solve underwater word puzzles and swim a dark cave with a flashlight
Spelling Air: Spell words correctly while hanging 100 feet above water or get dropped in
Spelling Eeb: Spell words backwards to shrink the opponent's tire stack, then restack 60 tires
Spin Again: Respin the wheel when a thrice-played challenge has been retired from it
Spin Class: Answer trivia when a giant wheel you're strapped to lands on you; three strikes and out
Spin Me Round: Spin a strapped partner to glimpse an answer key over a wall and recreate the pattern
Spinner: Hold onto your flag while strapped to a giant spinning wheel longer than your rival
Spokesmodel: Cling to a giant wheel that spins faster the longer you hold on
Sponge Worthy: Pass ocean water down a line of teammates using only sponges and bodies
Spool: Weave a rope under and over bamboo poles through a course and ring your gong
Spot On: Race to complete a partial pattern on a rock-climbing wall with the pieces provided
Spun Out: Spin down from a platform dizzy, then balance one-footed and stack stumps on a pole
Spy Dive: Skydive while memorizing a puzzle key, then run to a station and rebuild it from memory
Squaring Off: Fight a soccer ball through square hallways past your opponent's goal line
Stack Attack: Balance atop a giant tin top while stacking seven stars in its center
Stacked: Scrape off a code, paddleboard to collect pieces, and assemble a vertical puzzle
Stacking Stairs: Stack crates into a wobbly staircase and climb it to snatch a hanging flag
Stacking Up: Stack a tower of crates while balancing on it to reach a 20-foot-high bell
Stairway to Heaven: Build a pole staircase, zipline to grab puzzle bags, and solve the puzzle on top
Stairway to the Stars: Haul five logs through obstacles to a tower and build a staircase to the top
Star Bluff: Bluff about a boxed star over five rounds, then move yoga balls with giant chopsticks
Star Slice: Throw ninja stars to hit targets of the opponent's face three times
Star Struck: Free a pole from a vertical star maze, then use it to score a ball through a hole
Steady as You Go: Build a log walkway so teammates can cross between platforms without falling
Steamroller: Push a steel barrel against the opponent to your end of the platform
Storm the Castle: Haul heavy statues uphill to castle ruins, solving symbol checkpoints on the way
Stranded: Climb a DNA-shaped structure with 40 rods, grab letters, and solve a word puzzle
Strip Tease: Blindfolded, snatch all five patches off your opponent's jumpsuit first
Strung Out: Shimmy suspended under a pole to a bell and back, relaying with your partner
Stuck on Me: Walk a high narrow beam harnessed back-to-back, turn 360 degrees, and walk back
Stumped: Weave through a bamboo maze with wrists tied to a 25-foot pole with your partner
Submerged: Escape a sinking aircraft, grab 25 tiles, and replicate an underwater answer key onshore
Sunken Intelligence: Untie a 150-foot rope from a shipwreck and haul a diamond chest to shore
Sunken Treasure: Dive a deep tank to memorize codes and unlock a treasure chest with your partner
Supertramp: Release sandbags with a rope toss, then bounce them off a trampoline into net baskets
Surf's Up: Ride a flying surfboard off a cliff platform, then swim the buoys and ring a bell
Survive the Night: Escape a locked cell while handcuffed together by completing a series of tasks
Survivor Pentathlon: Replay a gauntlet of earlier season challenges and finish the final task first
Swat: Slap your opponent with fly swatters while chained to a table, then while holding a bucket
Swimming with Sharks: Dive into a shark lagoon relay-style to retrieve and assemble puzzle pieces
Swingers: Swing from a trapeze to a catch bar, drop into the water, and swim the buoy course
Switchback: Race to flip off the opponent's three skull lights while keeping your own switched on
Sync or Swim: Shovel sand to raise your container, then zipline down and swim to the finish
T-Bone: Run through intersecting half-pipes transferring balls to your partner's rack
Take It to the Grave: Match a buried partner's answers to trivia, then dig them out of a coffin and ring a bell
Take Shelter: Barricade a bunker for 20 minutes, then break into the opponent's bunker first
Take a Seat: Race to grab stadium seats, then hook weighted blocks into two equal-weight sections
Takes Two to Tango: Cross an obstacle-laden balance beam on a building's side, spinning at each circle
Talk Thirty to Me: Answer cast-mate trivia while suspended 30 feet over water; three X's drops you in
Target Practice: Throw balls into a goal from a rotating platform without falling off
Target Training: Race an obstacle course, shoot four targets with paintball guns, and haul back an artifact
Team Builders: Race through a series of ordered tasks to get every teammate through the course
Team Strength: Push a truck through a course, then push it back loaded with cinder blocks
Temple Wall Traverse: Match Roman numeral tiles on a climbing wall while rivals crank the walls apart
Tether Brawl: Swing a strapped partner to grab eight hanging puzzle pieces, then stack the puzzle
Thai Rise: Race up a temple to grab a bag of rice with a bell, then race down and hang it
That's a Wrap: Mummify yourself in a spool of cloth, then run across the field to your flag
The Brush Off: Cover yourself in red paint, transfer it to a partner, who body-paints canvas squares
The Elevator: Pull a chain from inside a cage to hoist your opponent's cage to the roof first
The Final Elimination: Tread water in the open ocean for hours with escalating arm restrictions
The Great Escape: Peg-climb a wall and tip a tub of mud onto your opponent's side
The Rack: Sit suspended between two bars over water longer than everyone else
The Reel World: Vault over a giant wheel repeatedly to reel a 50-pound weight across a line
The Rio Deal: Kick penalty shots, then race up a mountain through puzzle and teeter-totter checkpoints
Think Alike: Solve two tangram puzzles while riding a spinning platform
Think Outside the Box: Fetch puzzle pieces on a bungee so your boxed-in partner can build their way out
Think Tank: Lower your diver by ladder to memorize an underwater puzzle, then rebuild it onshore
This Land Is My Land: Relay forty-five pallets across a beach and stack them to raise your team flag
Thrash, Splash & Bash: Race obstacles to a drawbridge, chop free lettered blocks, and spell out a phrase
Throne Off: Cling to a missile over water while answering trivia to hand strikes to rivals
Through Thick & Thin: Sledgehammer through a cinderblock wall so your partner can pass and solve a puzzle
Throwback: Swing your partner into water, then swim to retrieve and dunk a soccer ball
Throwing Shade: Smash boxes and hurl the objects inside at targets of the opponent's face
Tic Tac Hole: Sink mini-golf putts to earn Connect 4 pieces and line up four in a row
Tight Quarters: Squeeze into a replica airplane bathroom together and solve two puzzles
Timbur: Balance on a stump holding two tree trunks longer than your opponent
Tire y Empuje: Pull against a back-strapped opponent to knock down three posts first
Tired Out: Race chained across the desert hauling tires to rebuild a memorized tire pyramid
To the Point: Throw balls at the opponent's spiked wall and land more on the spikes
Tomb Raider: Run to retrieve giant puzzle pieces, then fit them together on a solving platform
Too Clingy: Race across the top of a cargo net over a pond, then crawl back along its underside
Too Cool For Spool: Collect balls while tethered to a spinning spool and build a five-layer pyramid on top
Top Heavy: Swing on a harnessed beam to collect balls and sink ten baskets across the Arena
Torched: Hide ships on a grid and call coordinates to sink opponents, Battleship-style
Totally Mental: Count the items in ten crates and arrange the crates in numerical order
Tower of Power: Barricade your tower's gates, then storm the rival tower and lower their flag
Tracks of My Tears: Pull a cart up a tower, ride it down, then solve a puzzle first
Trapped: Slide into a ball pit, memorize a hidden puzzle key, climb back up and solve the puzzle
Tread Lightly: Balance a ball between sticks while crossing opposing treadmills to fill your bin
Trench Warfare: Race through a hallway to grab national flags and plant all 28 behind sandbag walls
Trick, Trick, Boom: Line up barrels and bounce a trick-shot ball off each panel into the final barrel
Triple Threat: Race to solve three puzzles before the opponent
Troubled Water: Bail water from a tank with your body, then hammer through its bottom to escape
Truck Crossing: Climb from one speeding tractor trailer to another across five moving cars
Truck It: Peg your way along a speeding truck to pass a baton and smash a hanging pot
Tug O' War: Pull a rope to yank the opponent off their platform first
Tuk Tuk Bang Bang: Ram a wall repeatedly to shove your tuk tuk down the driveway and topple it
Tunnel Time: Count flags in a dark tunnel and do the math to unlock your chained partner
Tunnel Vision: Crawl through a sand tunnel past an opponent and race to ring a bell
Turn Style: Push a giant log turnstile 180 degrees while the other team pushes back
Turning Agents: Spot symbols on a tank while strapped to a doughnut-spinning car to crack a lockbox
Unboxed: Carry bodyweight boxes down a trail, solving puzzles to drop them along the way
Unbraided: Reloaded: Unravel braided ropes off a speeding truck, then guide a peg through a maze
Unburied: Dig through hay piles to free your coffin-bound partner, then solve a brain-teaser
Under Control: Swim to buoys for sunken puzzle pieces and solve five puzzles on floating pontoons
Under Siege: Solve a hexagonal puzzle while locked inside a swinging shipping container
Under the Hammer: Sledgehammer 12 nails through concrete to smash the lightbulbs underneath
Undercover: Pull along an underwater line on one breath to collect rings that decipher a code
Undercover Comms: Relay codes from under a platform so a partner can unlock detonators and knock out rivals
Uphill Battle: Climb a widening ramp with a rung, using teammate support to reach the top
Ups and Downs: Hoist a teammate up a beam by rope to arrange all thirty Challenge logos in order
Upside Down Whirled: Spin on a truck-mounted propeller and toss rings onto targets and poles down a runway
Upside Downer: Swing upside down across a suspended rope platform collecting carvings
Vault Escape: Pull eight locks from a 20-foot vault while climbing, then jump off to ring the bell
Vertical Limit: Climb a buoy-lined rope as high as possible in three minutes, scoring per buoy
Vertigo: From a high perch, haul up ocean water by bucket to raise a flag or key
Walk Tiny: Hold a 50-foot rope towed by a monster truck longer than anyone else
Wall Ball: Throw a ball over each of four walls, then punch through them one by one
Wall of Fame: Match 24 castmates' names to trivia questions about photos on the house wall
Wall to Wall: Guide a wooden peg through a maze table and complete the final objective first
Watch Your Back: Play tag around a four-ladder platform, chasing until someone tags or passes
Water Battle: Haul buckets of water up a dirt pile and fill your team barrel over ten minutes
Water Bound: Bounce in a water tank while shackled to a weight and outlast everyone
Water Logged: Swing across hanging logs of different lengths to cross a platform over water
Water Torture (Mental): Hold your breath underwater to hoist your partner up to solve a memory game
Water Tower: Solve a slide puzzle while your partner climbs a tall container and dives out its bottom
We All Fall Down: Shove a hanging wall into the rival team to knock them all off a platform into water
Web of Lies: Descend a 25-foot tower through webs to grab a flag, then climb back up to plant it
Weight For Me: Hoist your partner up a wall by pulley so she can memorize and rebuild a tile puzzle
Weight For Me: Black Out: Hoist your partner by pulley at night while lugging 150 pounds to solve a tile puzzle
Weight Me Up: Run 35 cannonballs to hoist a partner up a wall for pieces, then solve a magic triangle
Weight Up: Throw sandbags into a crate to raise a wall, then hammer through cement and ring the bell
Weight for Me: Race up a mountain hauling heavy bags through checkpoints, then solve a summit puzzle
Weight, There's More: Haul 1,000 pounds of sandbags across the Arena, then solve a skull-sorting slide puzzle
Whalloped: Race around walls, battle past the opponent in the middle, and ring the bell three times
What a Croc: Cling to a spinning wheel as long as possible without touching the edge or falling
What's Going Down: Slide planks to descend a tower, then drop ten numbered balls down a chute in order
Wheel of Death: Spin on a wheel while directing a blindfolded partner to place puzzle symbols in order
Who Can Take It?: Endure electric shocks on a metal gurney longer than your opponent
Who's Got Balls: Jump off a cliff platform clutching five balls and hang onto as many as you can
Wobbly Boots: Balance on a wobbly platform, gradually letting go of ropes, longer than anyone else
Working the Angles: Rope-swing between suspended pyramids to recreate a puzzle key over water
Working the Poles: Traverse hanging poles over water along intersecting paths without falling
Wrap and Roll: Wrap and unwrap a rope with your partner to cross a platform 1,000 feet up
Wreck & Roll: Roll a giant sphere to knock down columns, then solve a word puzzle with the tyres
Wreck Yourself: Push a harnessed partner off a spinning aerial platform to swing and grab hanging rings
Wrecking Ball: Build a stone puzzle while your dangling partner swings around threatening to topple it
Wrecking Wall: Punch handholds up a 30-foot drywall panel to climb and ring your bell
Wring Out: Soak clothing in the ocean and wring the water into a bucket up to the fill line
X Battle: Wrestle an X-shaped bar out of your opponent's hands in same-gender rounds
X Knocks the Spot: Jump over and duck under swinging bars while standing on X-shaped platforms
X Marks the Spot: Run an obstacle course in pairs to grab puzzle pieces, then solve puzzles solo
X-Battle: Wrestle an X out of your opponent's grip in same-gender heats to score points
XXX Games: Saw a log with a partner in suggestive positions, then grab a ball by mouth from a pole
Yankin' My Chain: Drag your chained opponent around a circle to ring the bell on the far side
You Move I Move: Tilt a giant table maze from platforms to roll five balls out
Zero Gravity: Climb a ladder in a weight-assist harness to retrieve four flags before your rival
